blog_title: Plan Your Dubai Tour: Packages & Group Tours
seo_title: Plan Your Dubai Tour: Packages & Group Tours
description: Discover the ultimate travel packing list for every adventure. Pack smart, light, and stress-free with essential tips .
body_content:
Published by Travelxploria on Wed Jul 23 2025


Do you wish to visit the luxurious city of Dubai? With highly sought-after travel destinations, breathtaking places and highly enjoyable attractions, this dazzling city has so much on offer for you.

Why Choose a Dubai Tour Package from Kolkata?

It can be quiet challenging and overwhelming for you to plan a trip to Dubai as so many things are involved in the process. You have to apply for Visa, book flights, reserve accommodation and plan your itinerary in a proper way.

When you choose the professional tour package the entire process can get very simple for you. The journey can be absolutely hassle-free with pre-arranged accommodations, booking of activities and guided tours. With group tours, you can make your itinerary well-structured, well-arranged and cost-effective.

Top Dubai Tour Packages from Kolkata

For different types of travelers, tour operators have multiple Dubai tour packages that can easily be customized as per specific needs. Take a look at some of the most popular ones.

Budget-Friendly Dubai Tour Packages

For backpackers and solo travelers, these packages are perfect. You can get budget dining options, sightseeing activities and affordable accommodations. You can see top attractions such as Desert Safari, Dubai Mall, and Burj Khalifa.

 Luxury Dubai Tour Packages

If you are looking for a premium experience you would love to choose a luxury tour package for the city. You can get private city tours, luxury yacht rides and 5-star accommodations to stay in.

You can get the chance to see exclusive destinations such as Burj Al Arab, Atlantis The Palm and Palm Jumeirah.

Family-Friendly Dubai Tour Package

This type of package is best for families with kids. These include kid-friendly activities, cultural experiences and theme parks. You can check out attractions like Dubai Miracle Garden, IMG Worlds of Adventure and Dubai Aquarium.

Honeymoon Dubai Tour Package

For newly married couples, this package is ideal. You can get romantic experiences such as the chance to stay in beach resorts, have luxury dinners and go on a Dhow Cruise.

These types of packages cover top-notch destinations such as desert resorts, Dubai Marina and Jumeirah Beach.

Group Dubai Tour Package

For office groups or for travel with friends, you can find this option to be quite cost-effective. These include in group-friendly accommodations, adventure activities and guided tours. Adventure sports and all major landmarks are covered in this package.


Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

How to plan a trip to Dubai?

You have to pick a tour package of your choice, apply for a travel visa, book flights, choose the accommodation that you want to stay in and plan all your activities.

Why should you hire a professional Dubai tour from Kolkata agency?

You can get guided tours, pre-arranged accommodations and visa assistance as well as other kinds of help that can ensure a hassle-free experience.

What is the most important thing to remember while hiring Dubai group tours?

Before you make reservations, you should check the reputation of the agency, its customer reviews, inclusions and itinerary.

How to choose the best Dubai tour package for your family?

You should look for a package that includes family activities, comfortable accommodations, and child-friendly attractions.

What are the top destinations to include in a Dubai tour package from Kolkata?

You can visit various destinations like Desert Safari, Palm Jumeirah, Burj Khalifa, Dubai Mall, Dubai Marina, and Dubai Frame.


From family vacations and honeymoon trips to group tours and solo trips, you can get all kinds of travel experiences with the right package.
